ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the economic data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the economic data */,
  "realgdp" REAL /* Real Gross Domestic Product */,
  "realcons" REAL /* Real Consumption */,
  "realinv" REAL /* Real Investment */,
  "realgovt" REAL /* Real Government Spending */,
  "realdpi" REAL /* Real Disposable Personal Income */,
  "cpi" REAL /* Consumer Price Index (CPI) */,
  "m1" REAL /* Money Supply (M1) */,
  "tbilrate" REAL /* Treasury Bill Rate */,
  "unemp" REAL /* Unemployment Rate */,
  "pop" REAL /* Population */,
  "infl" REAL /* Inflation Rate */,
  "realint" REAL /* Real Interest Rate */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data entry */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data entry is the latest version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_quarter FOREIGN KEY ("quarter") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description or remarks about the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" INTEGER /* Quarter of the economic data */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the quarter */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the quarter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description or remarks about the quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, private, international) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source for reference */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., pending, passed, failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final, deprecated) */,
  "version_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* User role for which the dashboard is designed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the dashboard has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_role FOREIGN KEY ("user_role") REFERENCES users ("role"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
